headline: Top-3 mover watchlist confirmed at 13x edge; dashboard live and synced; four hypothesis rounds adjudicated—focus shifts to news-fitted candidates and distribution sizing.
what_happened: TICK-036 mining study (492 days, survivorship-clean) validates unfitted 20-name watchlist catches ≥1 of day's top-3 on 26.8% of days vs 2.0% random; median runner +90% at $3.80; edge is IDENTITY (repeated tickers), not prior-day price drift.
Dashboard rebuild shipped overnight: Sharpe updated to 1.25 (provisional), Calendar now merges ICARUS shadow days, skills.html live, Oracle daily brief panel + plist automation deployed and verified.

Four hypotheses adjudicated: HYP-094/095 below constitutional floor; HYP-097 refutes 30% collar thesis (sub-$3 tier yield fell to 0.0166%/day); HYP-099 intraday-gap regime is overfit mirage; HYP-096 withdrawn (unverified chat rule).
Shadow trading: 2 of last 4 days had signals (Jul 13–14); cumulative constitutional return 0.0005 (Jul 13–16 window).
what_it_means: The mining edge is real and tradeable at watchlist scale, but profitability depends on news/fitted-score filtering (HYP-099 rejected the raw intraday signal). Collar physics ruled out naive leverage on sub-$3 names—next yield levers are distribution-based sizing (RCK, W6) and catalyst concentration (TICK-034). Shadow days confirm the system is wired; you are 2/30 toward funded-sim gate.
todays_one_thing: Run HYP-099 candidates (news pass + fitted-score pre-registration) against today's top-3 movers to lock in the next hypothesis round and validate whether news-conditioned picks beat the 26.8% raw watchlist baseline.
